repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dose_response_shape_v1: finite-grid shape-closed outer bound, but for monotone-concave dose-response means without IV/copula rank-slice target

published_prior_art.cite: FirpoRidder2019/FanPark2010: treatment-effect coupling bounds from known marginals; no finite lifted cIV+copula slope envelope

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_dose_response_shape_v1: closest pasting-style proposal, but shape-only CMSM grid means, not continuous-IV plus adjacent rank-copula slope sharpness

published_prior_art.cite: BaitairianSebastienJreichKatsahianGuilloux2025 and DalalTchetgenTchetgen2025 give dosewise continuous-treatment sensitivity bounds; MadigasekaraPoskittZhangZhao2024 gives panel copula restrictions; none gives one full-data continuous-IV sensitivity/copula pasting theorem

Kline2016 identifies causal-effect direction using IV; Chesher2003 identifies local structural derivatives under nonseparable restrictions; neither is a bounded-confounding partial-ID copula-tube sign certificate
FirpoRidder2019: the ATE is the marginal-distribution functional; this theorem is a sanity specialization for the proposed slope target

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The closest local-derivative IV/rank comparator Chesher2003, Econometrica, is missing: it identifies local structural derivatives and quantiles of policy impacts in nonseparable models, so §5/§8 should distinguish the proposed partial-ID copula-tube sign certificate from that literature.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The sharpness claim quantifies over full-data laws with Γ-bounded unmeasured confounding, but the proposal only treats dosewise quantile envelopes as primitives; it must pin the exact sensitivity metric/normalization and continuous-IV law class.

soundness_flags.label: Corollary 1
soundness_flags.one_line: For an interior rank slice, ρ=1 removes the tube but conditioning on U0 in Sτ can still skew the conditional U-/U+ marginals, so the reduction is not the standard Fréchet/Makarov problem unless Sτ=[0,1] or extra conditional-marginal restrictions are imposed.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add Chesher2003, and ideally Jun2009, as explicit local structural-derivative comparators; explain that their point/local identification assumptions differ from bounded-confounding partial-ID plus cross-dose rank coupling.
Replace the abstract Γ-envelope language with one named sensitivity model and a precise full-data admissible-law definition before stating Conjecture 1.
Correct the ρ=1 sanity reduction by either restricting it to Sτ=[0,1] or deriving the exact selected-subcoupling characterization for interior rank slices.
Give a concrete two-bin or three-bin numerical witness for Conjecture 2 showing positive tube lower endpoint, nonpositive unrestricted endpoint, and full-population interval containing zero.

recommended_next_step: Revise the literature comparison, pin the Γ-sensitive full-data model, and repair the ρ=1 sanity corollary before advancing to Stage 0.
